subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and from its contents it became evident that thou art in a state of utmost fervor and longing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و از مفهوم معلوم شد که در نهایت شور و ولهی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement
